description: Fitz and Hunter infiltrate the base, using their IDs and a clever diversion involving Rusty's ferrets to trigger the alarm and clear the area. They locate the hidden pod within a warehouse that is stocked with S.H.I.E.L.D. technology. As the lockdown procedures isolate them, they quickly move to set up their escape.

transcript.line: Afternoon. We're here to fix a hole in the wall.
I.D.s. Rusty Peltzer and Jimmy Futterman.
That's us. You break it, we fix it and charge you the military mark-up. Too much? If Cooter hasn't got us in the system, then this is all over.
No. Then we'll find another way.
What? From our tiny little cells?
All clear. You know where you're going?
Know it like the back of our hands.
Rusty always said there was alien artifacts on this base. Maybe he wasn't so crazy after all.
Whoa, whoa, whoa, whoa. Careful. These are extremely volatile and unpredictable. Screw up once, you could lose a limb.
Once we do this, that's it, no turning back.
Let's do it.
Okay. Release the ferrets.
We got a 10-98 here. Repeat, a 10-98.
They'll instinctively head for the drains and vents. Motion sensors will interpret that as an escape, right? And procedure will seal the perimeter, leaving us alone in here.
Which is fine till we need to get out.
This is it.
You sure this is it?
This is gonna get me there if I'm lucky. All right. Let's get this back on the truck.
We're not gonna need a truck.
Brings back memories. We had some good times back in the day, in between all the bad times and being shot at and chased and attacked by monsters.
Yeah. This place, the base, always felt like home. Like family.
Ah, don't worry. You'll be together again soon.
You're just saying that.
Yeah, of course I am. They're stuck 70-odd years in the future, and our world's about to end. The odds, my friend, are not in your favor.
Are they ever?
Well, let's see what we've got here. Fitzy. We just hit the jackpot.
They've brought everything from S.H.I.E.L.D.
What the hell's going on here?!
Go upstairs, fire up the guidance system, and activate auto-takeoff. I'll hold them off here and close the doors!
Uh, shouldn't you do the technical, and I'll...
All right.
I know you mean well. I'm sorry that it has to end this way, but you have continually let me down. I don't trust you anymore.
You're demoting us?
No. I need a cleaning crew.
